name: @codepad/symbol-maker
description: Wizard logic and registry for creating variables/functions/classes without typing: pick modifiers and a type from codepad-rules, name via the on-screen keyboard's predictive list, and register the symbol for later click-to-reference.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/wizard.test.js dist/template.test.js dist/registry.test.js
